decisions: BM25 with .skillcat CSVs replaces static skill-map table in CLAUDE.md
.skillcat custom extension (CSV inside) to avoid collision with design CSVs
compliance 9 skills, repos cloned, structure mounted, content copied — pending SKILL.md writing and from-scratch builds
5 skills from pg-aiguide+planetscale+alirezarezvani, MongoDB+Redis pendientes de fuentes verificadas
5 skills (iac, containers, cicd, observability, scripting) con references originales reescritas al canon
rewrite references with full source content, deploy on sonnet
ship .env.example with MCP key placeholders, skill prompts user to configure on first use
8 plugins in marketplace covering 100% of web project lifecycle — 4 done, 4 to build
boot checks gh issue state for Next with #number (closed=skip), Next without issue use latest context() as cutoff
memos: (plugin)
antipattern - marketplace.json debe estar sincronizado con cada plugin.json, si no los usuarios no reciben updates
(plugin/architecture)
requirement - skillcat triggers must be domain-unique, processed not copied, minimal overlap between skills
(claude)
antipattern - do not blindly follow Yoda findings, use own judgement, never delete original content without asking
(plugin/compliance)
preference - all plugin content in English, never Spanish, even for Spanish-specific legislation
(plugin/agents)
antipattern - Alexandria and other agents create agent-memory dirs in .ref-repos and other dirs they explore, polluting read-only sources
(plugin/db)
antipattern - Alexandria reescribe contenido existente, no lo genera desde cero. Si hay que crear, lo hace el orquestador
(plugin/ops)
requirement - scripts mandatorios con paths completos en SKILL.md, un agente cold-start debe poder ejecutar sin ambiguedad
(plugin/flow)
preference - parar después de cada paso, mostrar resultado, hablar antes de continuar
(plugin/marketplace)
requirement - add database plugin to marketplace roadmap
(plugin/seo)
requirement - SKILL.md frontmatter canonical third-person format, complete trigger phrases, nothing missing
remembers: claude - read all loaded context before acting, asking, or exploring — the answer is usually already there
claude - read what the user ACTUALLY said before acting — past tense means already done, do not repeat
claude - kill process immediately when told, no questions, no waiting, no confirmation
claude - when user says do it yourself, do it yourself — never delegate to subagents against explicit instruction
claude - 11 preferencias criticas del usuario para construccion de plugins
claude - proceso completo de plugin building con 13 pasos, nunca inventar contenido, siempre repos verificados, actualizar README en cada commit
claude - leer contenido = simular agente frio ejecutando el workflow, no releer archivos buscando bugs
claude - merge after every deliverable in marketplace repos, do not wait
